violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in dry product need to be handle up.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -No vent hood over stove top or panini press.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Panini press not under a vent hood.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust on the ceiling by the back vent in the food prep/dish washing area.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
